home.hero_subtitle: A place where you feel happy and grateful with your body and mind.
home.about_text: Flex Room is designed to be your second home, a place where you feel happy and grateful with your body and mind. Our workouts focus on helping you build a lasting routine, maximizing your energy and improving your mental health.
home.funcional_desc: Take your body and mind to their highest potential in a complete workout with integrated movements to improve motor strength, balance, coordination and neuromuscular efficiency. 50-min session including warm-up, workout and relaxing stretch.
home.reformer_desc: Enjoy and connect with your inner strength through a guided machine session. Unlike traditional pilates, the reformer offers additional resistance through its springs. It will increase your joint mobility, improve your posture and help you build strong, lean muscles.
home.barre_desc: Enjoy fluid movement in a session that combines three disciplines: Yoga, Pilates and Ballet. Work to the rhythm of music and help develop stronger, more toned muscles without adding bulk.
